title: Khaitan & Co acts on Shriram Pistons ₹1,000 crore NCD issuance
description: Shriram Pistons & Rings Limited has made a maiden issue of listed, secured, rated, redeemable, non-cumulative, non-convertible debentures aggregating to ₹1,000 crore in two series, on a private placement basis.Khaitan & Co acted as the transaction counsel on this NCD issuance.The transaction team consisted of Manisha Shroff (Partner), Arjita Agarwal (Senior Associate), Akshansh Sharma (Senior Associate), Associates Rishabh Kumar, Charul Lunia and Shivansh Kumar Jain.Shriram PistonsThe pr
